title: Accelerator
text: Accelerator Name to represent the keyboard shortcut for accessing this menu item. Description If you define an accelerator for a menu item, the key combination is displayed next to the menu text at run time. This key combination must be defined in the [accelerators] section of the application .ini file. Applies To Menu Objects Menu Items Related Links Define Keyboard Shortcuts for Menu Items Menu definitions can define keyboard shortcuts that enable the user to select a menu item using the keyboard rather than the mouse. Keyboard shortcuts can be defined as an access key or an accelerator key. [accelerators] The [accelerators] section of the initialization file enables you to map a logical function, such as fileopen to a keyboard sequence (an accelerator) such as Ctrl+F7.
